columns.column_name: Adverse Events - N (%) | All-Cause Grade 3 or Higher | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The PDF mentions adverse effects in the 'Safety' section on page 5, stating that a summary was included in the 'initial publication' and that 'no additional long-term adverse effects were observed'. I looked in the 'Results' section (page 3) and the 'Safety' section (page 5).
